title: LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Pune team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd:
LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd!
